phases.name: Scaffold & Environment
phases.summary: pyproject.toml, Docker/compose, .env.example, structured logging, git init.

phases.name: Data Ingestion
phases.summary: Loaders for Shopify CSV, Confluence FAQ API, internal policy PDFs.

decisions.rationale: Faster on the 80-page policy doc in testing.

phases.name: Embedding & Vector Store
phases.summary: BGE-M3 embeddings + pgvector on RDS, verified round-trip retrieval on 20 sample docs.

decisions.rationale: PII constraint rules out external embedding APIs; BGE-M3 is self-hostable.
